Application For Entry Of Default Judgment Against Defendants Ashby Metal Products Inc., And Olson And Co. Steel
Off Calendar Feb-22-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendants Ashby Metal Products Inc. and Olson and Co. Steel.
Dept. 514. Judge: Cynthia Ming-Mei Lee. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Mitch L. Lyon, CSR #6840. Telephone: 415-551-3703.

Michael Espinosa, Esq. appeared for plaintiffs Myra McDaniel, as Successor-in-Interest to and as Wrongful Death Heir of Gary McDaniel, Deceased; and Teresa Medina, Gary Wayne McDaniel, as Wrongful Death Heirs of Gary McDaniel, Deceased.
No appearance by defaulted defendants Ashby Metal Products Inc. or Olson and Co. Steel.

Default was entered against defendant Ashby Metal Products Inc. on May 6, 2015.
Statement of Damages as to defendant Chas. Ayres Company was filed and served on May 6, 2015.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed on January 8, 2018.

Default was entered against defendant Olson and Co. Steel on March 17, 2015.
Statement of Damages as to defendant Olson and Co. Steel was filed and served on March 17, 2015.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed on January 8, 2018.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiffs Myra McDaniel, as Successor-in-Interest to and as Wrongful Death Heir of Gary McDaniel, Deceased; and Teresa Medina, Gary Wayne McDaniel, as Wrongful Death Heirs of Gary McDaniel, Deceased, and against the Defaulted Defendants Ashby Metal Products Inc. and Olson and Co. Steel, as follows:

Defendant Ashby Metal Products Inc:
Economic Damages: $386,690.51.
Non-Economic Damages - $10.000,000.00.
Total - $10,386,690.51.
